description_long: This shotgun features a robust double-barrel design with a metallic silver finish accented by gold trim and decorative star motifs along the stock and receiver. The barrels are parallel and of equal length, with a gold band near the muzzle and a matching gold sight bead. The stock is a traditional full stock, crafted in a dark wood tone with gold inlays and a stylized bird motif at the grip. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample protection for the trigger, and the trigger itself is gold-colored. The fore-end and receiver are reinforced with metallic elements, and the overall build suggests a blend of ornamental and functional design. The shotgun's visual style is both classic and ornate, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A double-barrel shotgun with silver and gold finishes, ornate star and bird motifs, and a full wooden stock. The design is both decorative and functional, with prominent gold accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the double barrels, gold star motifs on the stock, and the gold-accented trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the gold sight bead at the muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same decorative motifs and the full length of the barrels and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, equal length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
